title: Noesis qLLM real checkpoint/artifact loader
goal: Replace the real-path branch of Noesis qllm-load-checkpoint with a checked loader for qLLM/GeoRefine artifacts. Stub behavior remains only for #f or explicit stub. The loader should consume a small CI fixture and later the real attention/GeoRefine qllm_bundle path.
acceptance: qllm-load-checkpoint returns a non-stub qLLM state for a valid fixture artifact path
invalid/missing artifact paths fail loudly instead of silently returning stub
Noesis learned encoder and semantic-unify gates pass with the fixture
